g.text: OPA1622 dual op-amp on DIP-8 adapter

g.desc: OPA1622 dual op-amp on DIP-8 adapter

g.style: fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;

g.text: EN/MUTE left NC until module pad map/behavior is supplied

g.desc: EN/MUTE left NC until module pad map/behavior is supplied

g.style: fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;

g.text: Panel-mounted parts are represented as wired panel headers. A1 is a purchased MA12070 module socket; A2 is an OPA1622 DIP-8 adapter/socket.

g.desc: Panel-mounted parts are represented as wired panel headers. A1 is a purchased MA12070 module socket; A2 is an OPA1622 DIP-8 adapter/socket.

g.text: SUBOLI control unit - 2-layer carrier/motherboard schematic phase

g.desc: SUBOLI control unit - 2-layer carrier/motherboard schematic phase

g.text: C5/C7 decouple A2 +19V_HP to GND_STAR. C6/C8 decouple VGND to GND_SIG for bias stability.

g.desc: C5/C7 decouple A2 +19V_HP to GND_STAR. C6/C8 decouple VGND to GND_SIG for bias stability.

g.text: NT1 is the only intended GND_SIG to GND_STAR connection. Keep Class-D return current out of the headphone/input area during layout.

g.desc: NT1 is the only intended GND_SIG to GND_STAR connection. Keep Class-D return current out of the headphone/input area during layout.

g.text: Headphone output is AC-coupled: J4 sleeve connects to GND_SIG, not VGND.

g.desc: Headphone output is AC-coupled: J4 sleeve connects to GND_SIG, not VGND.

g.text: A1 EN/MUTE is intentionally left NC until the exact MA12070 module pad map and control behavior are supplied.

g.desc: A1 EN/MUTE is intentionally left NC until the exact MA12070 module pad map and control behavior are supplied.

g.text: Tactile = stereo 2xBTL. Never common OUT0B/OUT1B. No output LC filter.

g.desc: Tactile = stereo 2xBTL. Never common OUT0B/OUT1B. No output LC filter.

g.text: rheostat: pin 1 in, wiper pin 2 tied to pin 3 out

g.desc: rheostat: pin 1 in, wiper pin 2 tied to pin 3 out
